mapper.sql: SELECT id, customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, contact_phone, mobile, email, province, city, district, address, is_enabled, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM sys_customer WHERE isdeleted = 0
mapper.select:
AND customer_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%')
AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactPerson}, '%')
AND contact_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactPhone}, '%')
AND mobile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{mobile}, '%')
AND is_enabled = #{isEnabled}
ORDER BY create_time DESC

AND customer_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerCode}, '%')
AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND is_enabled = #{isEnabled}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_customer( customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, contact_phone, mobile, email, province, city, district, address, is_enabled, remark, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{customerCode}, #{customerName}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{address}, #{isEnabled}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_customer
customer_code = #{customerCode}, customer_name = #{customerName}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, mobile = #{mobile}, email = #{email}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, address = #{address}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND isdeleted = 0
UPDATE sys_customer SET isdeleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND isdeleted = 0
UPDATE sys_customer SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND isdeleted = 0
